card_description: K.W. Jeter is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick formalizes his "Ham Sandwich" model of reality: a triune structure of Teacher (Zebra) / Artifact World (The "Ham") / Pupils (Humans)."
